CIT.notes: Federal CIT 8.5% on after-tax profit (~7.83% on pre-tax); cantonal+communal rates add ~5-15%; total effective ~14-24% depending on canton; Zug ~12%, Zurich ~19.7%

VAT.notes: Standard 8.1%; reduced 2.6% (food, books, medicine); special 3.8% (hotel accommodation); rates effective since 2024

IIT.notes: Federal income tax top rate ~11.5%; cantonal+communal adds ~10-25%; total marginal rate varies 22-45% by canton; Geneva ~45%, Zug ~22%
